mapper.select: SELECT FROM_UNIXTIME(create_time, '%H') AS hour, COUNT(*) AS newMembers FROM cb_member WHERE deleted = 0 AND create_time >= #{from} AND create_time < #{to} GROUP BY hour ORDER BY hour

SELECT FROM_UNIXTIME(create_time, '%m-%d') AS label, FROM_UNIXTIME(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS ymd, COUNT(*) AS newMembers FROM cb_member WHERE deleted = 0 AND create_time >= #{from} AND create_time < #{to} GROUP BY ymd, label ORDER BY ymd
SELECT FROM_UNIXTIME(create_time, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS newMembers FROM cb_member WHERE deleted = 0 AND create_time >= #{from} AND create_time < #{to} GROUP BY month ORDER BY month
